name: io.github.rezearcher/tech-risk
description: MCP security scanner: audit any MCP server for tool-poisoning / prompt-injection / exfiltration / dangerous-capability (OWASP LLM01/LLM08). FREE preview (issue count + risk score) via scan_mcp_preview; paid itemized findings via scan_mcp_server ($0.05 USDC, x402). Also tech-stack -> CVE/EPSS/CISA-KEV enrichment.
